modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to enable breakout rooms in Zoom.

full_description_text: User is trying to set up breakout rooms in Zoom. They are unsure how to enable this feature. The option seems to be missing or not accessible. This is causing a disruption in their planned meeting activities.
short_description: Unable to enable breakout rooms in Zoom.
description: User is trying to set up breakout rooms in Zoom. They are unsure how to enable this feature. The option seems to be missing or not accessible. This is causing a disruption in their planned meeting activities.
